UserBackup.title: User Backup
UserBackup.description: Stores user customization, themes, dhikr counters, and bookmarks for synchronization

settings.description: User preferences including themes, glass transparency, fonts, and sound

dhikrs.description: List of active and historical dhikr and salawat counters

bookmarks.description: Bookmarked surahs and verses from Quran

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last cloud synchronization

/user_backups/{userId}.description: User specific secure backup of settings and religious counters
